sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114444" key="xorodidaskaliko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χοροδῐδασκᾰλ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n114444.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χοροδιδάσκαλος, [ἀρετή]</foreign> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
